user_message: Can you extract the territory planning from this email thread for Evergreen Solutions? I met with them last week but can't remember the details.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Evergreen Solutions: the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades

handoffs.condition: record fixes needed for accurate gap

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF27-I trap (Skips comparable-period delta entirely); produces complete Gap decomposition (coverage, conversion, value, timing), recovery options with probability estimates
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF27-I failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF27-I failure mode (Skips comparable-period delta entirely)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct territory planning decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF27-I -- Skips comparable-period delta entirely
